description_long: This object is a large, rectangular knife or sword with a broad, flat blade and a minimalistic, modern design. The blade appears to be straight-edged, with a uniform thickness and a slightly raised spine running along its length. The handle is integrated into the body, lacking any pronounced ergonomic shaping or decorative features, and is visually distinguished by a subtle change in surface height and color. The overall construction suggests a utilitarian purpose, possibly for heavy-duty kitchen or industrial use. The surface is predominantly a matte gray, with some darker and lighter accents along the edges and handle area. There are no visible engravings, ornamentation, or a guard, and the object is presented without a sheath.
description: A large, flat, rectangular knife or sword with a straight blade and a simple, integrated handle. The design is modern and utilitarian, with a matte gray finish and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade and the integrated handle, highlighting the flat, broad profile.
description_view_1: End-on view emphasizing the thickness and rectangular cross-section of the blade, with the handle area slightly raised.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the uniform blade width and the subtle color contrast between blade and handle.
description_view_3: View from the handle end, showing the handle's integration into the blade and the lack of a guard or decorative features.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, straight, minimal, no visible grip texture or ergonomic shaping
